tajikistan.name: Tajikistan
tajikistan.primaryNote: Import duties and VAT/GST apply. Commercial invoice required. Customs declaration mandatory. Check specific country regulations for restricted items. Route: Afghanistan to Tajikistan.
altNotes: Import duties and VAT/GST apply. Commercial invoice required. Customs declaration mandatory. Check specific country regulations for restricted items. Route: Albania to Tajikistan.
Import duties and VAT/GST apply. Commercial invoice required. Customs declaration mandatory. Check specific country regulations for restricted items. Route: Algeria to Tajikistan.

Import duties and VAT vary by country. Pre-shipment inspection may be required. Commercial invoice and packing list mandatory. Route: Algeria to Tanzania.

thailand.primaryNote: Thai customs: VAT 7%. Duty-free under THB $1,500. BOI privileges for certain goods.
altNotes: Thai customs duties vary. VAT 7%. Some goods require import permits.

united-arab-emirates.name: United Arab Emirates
united-arab-emirates.primaryNote: UAE customs: VAT 5%. Duty 5% on most goods. Free zones exempt. Dubai Trade portal for clearance.
altNotes: UAE VAT 5%. No customs duty in free zones. Standard rate 5% on most goods.
UAE customs 5% standard rate. Free zone benefits available.

united-kingdom.name: United Kingdom
united-kingdom.primaryNote: UK customs: VAT 20%. Duty-free under £135. EORI number required post-Brexit. HMRC clearance.
altNotes: UK customs duty applies on goods over GBP135. VAT at 20% on most items.
UK customs duty + VAT 20%. Low value consignment relief for items under GBP135.

united-states.name: United States
united-states.primaryNote: US customs: Duty-free under $800 (de minimis). FDA clearance for food/drugs. CBP Form 3461 for commercial.
altNotes: US customs duties apply. De minimis $800. Section 301 tariffs on Chinese goods.
KORUS FTA eliminates most duties. US customs still apply on some goods.
